query: SELECT se.stationCode, COALESCE(u.name, u.username, CONCAT('user-', se.operatorUserId)) AS operatorName, COUNT(*) AS eventCount, SUM(CASE WHEN p.categoryId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missingCategoryCount FROM station_events se LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId WHERE se.countForProductivity = 1 AND se.businessDate >= '2026-05-01' AND se.businessDate < '2026-06-01' GROUP BY se.stationCode, se.operatorUserId, operatorName ORDER BY se.stationCode, operatorName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT se.stationCode, COALESCE(u.name, u.username, CONCAT('user-', se.operatorUserId)) AS operatorName, COUNT(*) AS eventCount, SUM(CASE WHEN p.categoryId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missingCategoryCount FROM station_events se LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId WHERE se.countForProductivity = 1 AND se.businessDate >= '2026-05-01' AND se.businessDate < '2026-06-01' GROUP BY se.stationCode, se.operatorUserId, operatorName ORDER BY se.stationCode, operatorName;
